arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen have only lost once, so why are they six points behind Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: Defending Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen have only lost once in the league so far this season, so how come they're six points behind leaders Bayern Munich? First-half goals from Patrik Schick and Aleix García had put Leverkusen 2-0 up and on course for the points, but they were pegged back and failed to win – and not for the first time this season.

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface: Leverkusen star left out of training amid transfer
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen's Victor Boniface was left out of training on Tuesday as German media reports linked the striker with a move to Saudi Arabian club Al Nassr, with manager Xabi Alonso saying negotiations for the player's transfer were ongoing. Our preparation for the match remains the same," Alonso told reporters ahead of the Champions League clash against Sparta Prague on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen join host of Premier League clubs in race for Evan Ferguson
arts.sum: Bournemouth, West Ham and Tottenham keen on striker Dortmund, Juventus and Porto keen on Chukwuemeka Bayer Leverkusen have joined the race to sign Evan Ferguson but face competition for the Brighton striker from Bournemouth, Everton, Tottenham and West Ham. Ferguson, who is recovering from an ankle injury, has fallen down the pecking order at the Amex stadium this season and Brighton are deliberating over whether to let the Republic of Ireland international leave on loan. Interested clubs are under the impression that a permanent deal is not on the table. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen linked with move for Evan Ferguson
arts.sum: Transfer expert Ronan Murphy reports that Bayer 04 Leverkusen are in talks to sign Irish striker Evan Joe Ferguson.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso’s Bayer Leverkusen agree deal for ex-Atlético Madrid defender
arts.sum: German champions Bayer Leverkusen have this week closed an agreement to sign a former member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Atlético Madrid. That’s according to transfer insider…

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface absent from Bayer Leverkusen training as move to Saudi Arabia moves closer
arts.sum: Victor Boniface was absent from Bayer Leverkusen’s training today as a proposed move to Saudi Arabia moves closer, reports kicker. In recent days, Boniface has been linked with a move to…

arts.ttl: Boniface misses Leverkusen training due to "talks about his future" amid Al Nassr links
arts.sum: Victor Boniface missed Bayer Leverkusen's training session on Tuesday due to "talks about his future" amid reports that Saudi Arabian side Al Nassr want to sign him.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Andreas Christensen to Brentford, Mario Hermoso to Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Andreas Christensen to Brentford and Mario Hermoso to Bayer Leverkusen.
